metadata.description: A curated collection of expert Copilot CLI agents, organized by domain

plugins.name: core-development
plugins.description: Core software development agents for APIs, frontend, backend, mobile, and full-stack work

plugins.name: language-specialists
plugins.description: Framework and language specialist agents for Go, Python, Ruby, JS/TS stacks

plugins.name: infrastructure
plugins.description: Infrastructure and platform agents for cloud, DevOps, Kubernetes, security, and SRE

plugins.name: quality-security
plugins.description: Quality assurance and security agents for testing, code review, compliance, and pen testing

plugins.name: data-ai
plugins.description: Data and AI agents for ML engineering, data science, NLP, MLOps, and LLM architecture

plugins.name: developer-experience
plugins.description: Developer experience agents for build tooling, documentation, refactoring, and DX

plugins.name: specialized-domains
plugins.description: Specialized domain agents for embedded systems, fintech, gaming, IoT, and more

plugins.name: research-analysis
plugins.description: Research and analysis agents for competitive intelligence, literature review, and trend analysis
